title: Roamwild Multi Dryer Clothes Airer Drying Rack Foldable Rotary Adjustable 2 TIER – 36m of Hanging line in 1m square footprint – Cover & Anchor pegs included - Cool Grey
features: The Roamwild 2-Tier Rotary Clothes Airer with a HUGE 36m of drying space in just a 1m squared footprint! It can hold up to 3 wash loads at a time. Making it perfect for energy savings and busy family life, allowing gentle drying so your clothes last longer.

The rotary feature allows on the spot loading and easy rotation of clothes! No more needing to move around the dryer during the hanging out process, let the dryer move for you! Being rotary also allows you to easily and quickly periodically turn the clothes towards the heat source for faster more convenient drying.

Packed full of unique features - Unique patent pending extending arms gives this this dryer ultimate adjustability and versatility and optimizes space. An array of useful hooks allow for easy hanging of smaller items, and the bespoke moulded clips allow you to hang large towels or sheets easily. Use it how you want to!

This light grey indoor clothes drying rack blends in nicely with every day furniture and features a VERY sturdy frame that folds with ease for convenient storage. Protection cover is included. Aluminum arms protect against rust and mildew.

The non-slip feet prevent the clothes horse from leaving scratches on all hard floors. Dryer comes with a stylish cover & 4 x outdoor anchor pegs to allow you to anchor if using outside on your lawn during the sunnier times!
